infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow AI Mechanic to use your camera to diagnose car issues.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow AI Mechanic to record audio for engine sound diagnosis.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow AI Mechanic to pick photos and videos of your car.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow AI Mechanic to find nearby repair shops.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Allow AI Mechanic to authenticate you with Face ID.
infoPlist.NSBluetoothAlwaysUsageDescription: Allow AI Mechanic to connect to OBD-II Bluetooth adapters.

plugins.bluetoothAlwaysPermission: Allow $(PRODUCT_NAME) to connect to OBD-II Bluetooth adapters
